title: MC Ranked PVP Modpack
description: This modpack adds a ranked system to Minecraft. Tracks player wins, losses, and rank points. Matches players with similar ranks. Displays leaderboards and rank progress.
body:
### MCRanked: PvP Modpack ### 

Make your combat experience better. This modpack is made for people who really want to play Minecraft PvP. This pack is based on the MCRanked system and gets rid of lag and optimizes every frame so that your rank is based on your skill, not your hardware!

**Main Features:**

-  [MCRanked Integration: Full support for the ranking system that lets people compete. Keep track of your wins, move up the leaderboards, and find people to play against who are at your level.](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcranked)

- Ultra-Performance Optimization: Comes with the best optimazition mods to give you the best FPS and "frame-perfect" inputs.
  
- PvP Enhanced HUD: Simple changes to the user interface that let you keep your attention on the fight.
